summary: Soundboard capture of a punchy “New Speedway Boogie,” but limited detail leaves the overall recording quality unclear.
review: One reviewer raves about the energy of New Speedway Boogie, calling it a standout moment despite later versions being considered superior. No concrete comments on the mix or clarity are provided, and another review merely notes a download issue, leaving the technical side ambiguous.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two brief reviews; one praises a single song while the other is unrelated to performance. With scant information on audio quality, a moderate rating reflects an average show and unknown recording fidelity.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer mentions clarity, balance, or mix issues; the filename suggests a soundboard source but quality cannot be confirmed.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Insufficient commentary to assess set pacing or flow.
